phases.name: state-backup
phases.evidence: redacted six-resource legacy backup digest is pinned independently from the new-provider golden state

phases.name: old-refresh-no-op
phases.evidence: requires the pinned takosumi provider artifact, lock file, and a reachable host

phases.name: approved-remove-import
phases.evidence: bijection, lineage/schema-version continuity, canonical identity, and overlapping desired attributes verified for all six real legacy resource types

phases.name: new-refresh-no-op
phases.evidence: requires a built candidate provider and a reachable versioned Form host

phases.name: old-artifact-lock-rollback
phases.evidence: the structural backup retains the exact old address/types; rollback refresh no-op still requires the pinned old artifact, lock, and host

externalBlockers: pinned old takosumi provider artifact and exact lock/HCL migration input
reachable operator migration host with the six canonical Resources backfilled to exact FormRefs and ResolutionLocks
